notes: Three-declaration leaf file: a CoordHom-free Weil-pairing scaling core theorem (weilPairing_scaling_core), a bundled geometric witness predicate (FrobeniusScalingWitnesses), and the discharged Frobenius scaling theorem (frobeniusScaling_of_witnesses).
